content:
Hello everyone,

As you all are aware we are updating our server rules to create a more positive, welcoming, and safe environment for all members.

Effective immediately, we are implementing a no-swearing policy across all channels. Our moderation bots (AutoMod) have been configured to automatically filter and remove all profane language.

While Discord's official Terms of Service and Community Guidelines permit some casual profanity, they have very strict policies against hate speech, harassment, and severe explicit content. Our new rule goes a step further to maintain a cleaner, more professional, or friendly space that aligns with our specific community goals and upholding Discords TOS.

What this means for you:

Please refrain from using any swear words, slurs, or overly explicit language in any channel.
The filter is live now. If you try to use a banned word, your message will be automatically blocked or deleted.

Repeated attempts to bypass the filter or intentional rule-breaking will result in moderation action, including potential warnings, mutes, or bans.

We appreciate your cooperation in helping us maintain a safe and respectful community for everyone!
